arts.ttl: Luton Town in advanced talks to sign Willem Geubbels on loan from St Gallen
arts.sum: According to Foot Mercato, Luton Town are in advanced talks to sign Willem Geubbels (23) on loan from St Gallen in the winter transfer window. The former Monaco forward is contracted…
